docs.title: Flight API Documentation
docs.text: Welcome to the Flight API — a RESTful service to search for flights data, like prices, schedules or delays.

docs.title: Usage
docs.text: At the moment, this API is only available through RapidAPI, and you must subscribe to a free or paid plan to use it.

docs.title: GET /v1beta1/flights
GET /v1beta1/tracking
